Containers.Name: ShipLog
Containers.Description:
Read-only update advisor, right inside Unraid's native Docker tab.
ShipLog adds a small changelog bubble next to each container: what actually changes between your running image and the newest one, a deterministic risk verdict (patch / minor / major), the release notes, and a DEPRECATED badge when the upstream repo is archived. It remembers the running version, so even a ":latest" container shows a real "1.7 -> 1.8" jump.
Read-only by construction - it never pulls, recreates or stops anything (the Docker socket is read-only; updating stays Unraid's own job). Optional: AI changelog summaries via a local Ollama, and Matrix notifications when a new update is first seen.
Runs as a lightweight host daemon (no extra container). Follows your Unraid light/dark theme and language (English + German, English fallback).
